All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Enum Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractBinderFactory
    AbstractBinderFactory implements standard buildBinder functionality.
    BasicBinderFactory
    A demo binder factory.
    BasicGraphStore
    BasicGraphStore shows that to have a full-fledged knowledge-graph service running, we only need to implement our own GraphStore to make it running.
    BinderFactory
    A binder factory builds a custom binder for the Jersey application.
    DataFetcherFactory
    A sanity-check data fetcher factory that defines some demo data for querying.
    DataServlet
    Endpoint for POSTing and GETing graph data.
    ErrorMessageFormat
    Common message formats for errors.
    ErrorMessageFormat
    Common message formats for errors.
    GraphQLFactory
    GraphQLFactory is loaded statically and is, therefore, thread-safe.
    GraphStore
    A GraphStore is an abstraction layer between Aristotle's application layer and the sea of graph data.
    MessageFormatter
    MessageFormatter provides shared functionality to provide formatted logging and messaging.
    ResourceConfig
    The resource configuration for the Aristotle web applications.
    SystemConfig
    SystemConfig is an interface for retrieving configuration values, allowing for implicit type conversion and use of a runtime properties interface to override configured settings.
    SystemConfigFactory
    SystemConfigFactory provides a SystemConfig instance.
    TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
    TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor is a visitor that, by the end of its visit of a Document, returns the first selection field argument value whose key is "id".
